TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === miru, Watan Taya 撰文:張新仙 === Pyasan misu qani ga cyux sa hogan Taoyun na Pyasan. qyunam ta ita Tayal. ki'an gluw Gogan qu yatux hiya ru ki'an gluw Sbtunux ki Mng'ciq qu hogan hiya. lalu rhzyal Thiluw misu ga "復興". ita Tayal son ta "Pyasan" lalu nya. baha hmswa' s'inu ta motux na binkisan Payas ru s'agal ta lalu nya tlalu rhzyal qani. Pyasan Gogan部族與前山地區的Sbtunux部族和Mng'ciq Pyasan,因紀念祖先Payas . baq balay tminun qu ita Tayal. trahu ru krhun mita ggluw squ baq balay tminun qu kneril. mkmi wayal lga, blaq musa qmpul hongu utux tta' 'tuxan gmiba skutaw binkisan. .
S.PHON: === miru, watan taja **:*** === pjas~ɕan mis~ɕu qani ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕa ħoɣan taojun na pjas~ɕan. qjunam ta ita tajal. kiʔan ɣluw ɣoɣan qu jatux ħija ru kiʔan ɣluw s~ɕβtunux ki mŋʔʦ~ʨiq qu ħoɣan ħija. lalu rħzjal tħiluw mis~ɕu ɣa "**". ita tajal s~ɕon ta "pjas~ɕan" lalu nja. βaħa ħms~ɕwaʔ s~ɕʔinu ta motux na βinkis~ɕan pajas~ɕ ru s~ɕʔaɣal ta lalu nja tlalu rħzjal qani. pjas~ɕan ɣoɣan********s~ɕβtunux***mŋʔʦ~ʨiq pjas~ɕan,*****pajas~ɕ . βaq βalaj tminun qu ita tajal. traħu ru krħun mita ɣɣluw s~ɕqu βaq βalaj tminun qu kneril. mkmi wajal lɣa, βlaq mus~ɕa qmpul ħoŋu utux ttaʔ ʔtuxan ɣmiβa s~ɕkutaw βinkis~ɕan. .
S.FORM: === miru, Watan Taya 撰文:張新仙 === Pyasan misu qani ga cyux sa hogan Taoyun na Pyasan. qyunam ta ita Tayal. ki'an gluw Gogan qu yatux hiya ru ki'an gluw Sbtunux ki Mng'ciq qu hogan hiya. lalu rhzyal Thiluw misu ga "復興". ita Tayal son ta "Pyasan" lalu nya. baha hmswa' s'inu ta motux na binkisan Payas ru s'agal ta lalu nya tlalu rhzyal qani. Pyasan Gogan部族與前山地區的Sbtunux部族和Mng'ciq Pyasan,因紀念祖先Payas . baq balay tminun qu ita Tayal. trahu ru krhun mita ggluw squ baq balay tminun qu kneril. mkmi wayal lga, blaq musa qmpul hongu utux tta' 'tuxan gmiba skutaw binkisan. .
S.PHON: === miru, watan taja **:*** === pjas~ɕan mis~ɕu qani ɣa ʦ~ʨjux s~ɕa ħoɣan taojun na pjas~ɕan. qjunam ta ita tajal. kiʔan ɣluw ɣoɣan qu jatux ħija ru kiʔan ɣluw s~ɕβtunux ki mŋʔʦ~ʨiq qu ħoɣan ħija. lalu rħzjal tħiluw mis~ɕu ɣa "**". ita tajal s~ɕon ta "pjas~ɕan" lalu nja. βaħa ħms~ɕwaʔ s~ɕʔinu ta motux na βinkis~ɕan pajas~ɕ ru s~ɕʔaɣal ta lalu nja tlalu rħzjal qani. pjas~ɕan ɣoɣan********s~ɕβtunux***mŋʔʦ~ʨiq pjas~ɕan,*****pajas~ɕ . βaq βalaj tminun qu ita tajal. traħu ru krħun mita ɣɣluw s~ɕqu βaq βalaj tminun qu kneril. mkmi wajal lɣa, βlaq mus~ɕa qmpul ħoŋu utux ttaʔ ʔtuxan ɣmiβa s~ɕkutaw βinkis~ɕan. .
